title: ws: tokio-tungstenite dependency and connect/reconnect
description:
Add WebSocket transport infrastructure to crates/jmap-chat:
- Add tokio-tungstenite to Cargo.toml (workspace dep)
- Add ws module: ws/mod.rs, ws/connection.rs
- WsConnection: connect to session.capabilities[urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat:websocket].wsUrl
- Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff (same pattern as SSE)
- Capability detection: if session has WebSocket capability, prefer WS over SSE; fall back to SSE if connection fails
- Tests: mock WebSocket server using tokio-tungstenite server side
close_reason: Epic complete: WebSocket transport client implemented, reviewed, and all review issues resolved
